stemHtml: An aircraft is about to execute an ILS approach to Thule, Greenland. The final track towards the ILS of runway 08 is 085°(T). The aircraft is approaching the VOR with a heading of 123°(M) and drift is 10° left. The pilot needs to follow true headings for this procedure. Variation is given on the chart as 57°W. What is the true heading that the aircraft is following towards the VOR before entering the outbound leg of the ILS approach?
